hero.subtitle: This isn't a club directory — it's where students actually show up. Sports, culture, startups: real events, real people, real momentum. Your campus life, finally worth caring about.

about.title: About VibeHub Club
about.paragraph1: VibeHub is more than just a club — it's a movement within the university. We bridge the gap between passion and professional growth by giving students a platform to excel in sports, culture, and entrepreneurship.
about.paragraph2: Founded on pillars of inclusivity and excellence, we empower students to step out of their comfort zones and lead the next generation of campus life.

activity.subtitle: Find the environment that matches your energy, creativity, and long-term goals.

items.title: Sports & Fitness
items.desc: Competitive leagues, recovery culture, discipline, and a strong team mindset.

items.title: Arts & Culture
items.desc: Music, visual arts, theater, and creative collaborations across communities.

items.title: Entrepreneurship
items.desc: Building startups, leading projects, and connecting ambitious founders.

eventsPreview.title: Curated experiences
eventsPreview.subtitle: Handpicked events to inspire, connect, and elevate our community.

gallery.title: Community Moments
gallery.subtitle: Glimpses into our vibrant club life

aboutHero.title: Beyond the Lecture Hall
aboutHero.subtitle: VibeHub is more than a club; it's a launchpad for the next generation of athletes, artists, and innovators.

aboutStory.title: Built by students,
aboutStory.paragraph1: VibeHub started because we kept missing things — the football trial nobody posted about, the pitch night that filled up in a day. We weren't looking to build a platform. We just wanted to actually know what was happening on campus.
aboutStory.paragraph2: Now it's the place where sports teams recruit, culture crews promote, and student founders find their first teammates. Three communities, one feed.

aboutMission.title: Driven by action and community.
aboutMission.missionText: To provide every student with the resources, network, and environment to pursue their passions beyond academics.
aboutMission.visionText: To become the definitive hub for student talent, where ideas are built, skills are tested, and lifelong connections are made.
aboutMission.valuesText: We believe in pushing boundaries, supporting one another, and leaving the campus better than we found it.

aboutDomains.title: Three domains. One ecosystem.
aboutDomains.subtitle: We organize our activities into three core pillars, designed to develop well-rounded leaders and creators.

sports.title: Sports
sports.description: Competitive leagues, casual tournaments, and a focus on physical and mental endurance.

culture.title: Culture
culture.description: Music, art, debate, and events that celebrate diversity and creative expression.

entrepreneurship.title: Entrepreneurship
entrepreneurship.description: Hackathons, pitch days, and networking to turn student ideas into reality.

aboutTeam.title: Meet the Board
aboutTeam.subtitle: The students working behind the scenes to make it all happen.

aboutCta.title: Ready to step up?
aboutCta.subtitle: Whether you want to compete, create, or just find your people — there's a place for you here.

contact.subtitle: A question, a partnership idea, or just want to say hello — our team is here and happy to help.
contact.successMessage: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.ctaSubtitle: Hundreds of students found their crew, their projects, and their confidence through this platform. Your story starts the same way — just show up.
contact.ctaFootnote: No credit card. No pressure. Just your campus, better.

eventsHero.eyebrow: Campus life, all in one place
eventsHero.subtitle: Sports sessions, cultural evenings, startup workshops — real events, real people, happening on your campus right now.
